messages.content: What is healthier, baked potatoes on their skins or wholewheat pasta?

Baked potatoes on their skins are healthier. Wholewheat pasta is a good source of fiber, protein, and vitamins. However, it is also high in carbohydrates. Baked potatoes on their skins are a good source of fiber, protein, and vitamins. They are also lower in carbohydrates than wholewheat pasta.
Compare baked potatoes on their skins and wholewheat pasta, in a table

| Comparison | Baked Potatoes on Their Skins | Wholewheat Pasta |
|---|---|---|
| Calories | 166 | 204 |
| Carbohydrates | 37 grams | 45 grams |
| Fiber | 4 grams | 6 grams |
| Protein | 4 grams | 7 grams |
| Vitamins | A, C, B6, B12, potassium, iron | A, C, B6, B12, potassium, iron |
